title: Poly(alkoxylates/ethers) Group - Canada.ca
content:
## Poly(alkoxylates/ethers) Group
- Poly(alkoxylates/ethers) Group - information sheet
- Federal Environmental Quality Guidelines for Alcohol Ethoxylates
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP). The screening assessment focuses on 21 substances referred to collectively under the CMP as the Poly(alkoxylates/ethers) Group.
- Summary of publications
Public comments on the draft screening assessment
Final screening assessment
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities

Poly(propylene glycol) (PPG)

None planned at this time
Paraformaldehyde (PF)
Alcohol Ethoxylate Sulfates (AES)
Poly(oxy-1,2-ethanediyl), α-sulfo-ω-(dodecyloxy)-, sodium salt
Poly(oxy-1,2-ethanediyl), α-sulfo-ω-hydroxy-, C10-16-alkyl ethers, ammonium salts
Poly(oxy-1,2-ethanediyl), α-sulfo-ω-hydroxy-, C10-16-alkyl ethers, sodium salts
Alcohol Ethoxylates (AE)
Poly(oxy-1,2-ethanediyl), α-dodecyl-ω-hydroxy-
Alcohols, C12-13, ethoxylated
Alcohols, C10-16, ethoxylated
Alcohols, C12-15, ethoxylated
Alcohols, C6-12, ethoxylated
Alcohols, C9-11, ethoxylated
Alcohols, C12-14, ethoxylated
Alcohols, C14-15, ethoxylated
Octylphenol Ethoxylates (OPE)
Poly(oxy-1,2-ethanediyl), α-[4-(1,1,3,3-tetramethylbutyl)phenyl]-ω-hydroxy-
Poly(oxy-1,2-ethanediyl), α-[(1,1,3,3-tetramethylbutyl)phenyl]-ω-hydroxy-
Alkyl Amine Ethoxylates (ANEO)
Poly(oxy-1,2-ethanediyl), α,α’-[(methyloctadecyliminio)di-2,1-ethanediyl]bis[ω-hydroxy-, chloride
Amines, soya alkyl, ethoxylated
Amines, tallow alkyl, ethoxylated (POEA)
Amines, C14-18 and C16-18-unsatd. alkyl, ethoxylated
Amines, C8-18 and C18-unsatd. alkyl, ethoxylated
Amines, N-tallow alkyltrimethylenedi-, propoxylated
Publication of the final screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 156, No. 45 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 153, No. 50 .
These 21 substances were previously evaluated under the second phase of polymer rapid screening , which identified some of the substances in this group for further assessment due to potential human health and/or ecological risks.
